description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum can with a vibrant gradient label transitioning from purple at the top to deep blue at the bottom. The front of the can features a large Roman numeral II, the word 'ZODIAC', and a ring of zodiac symbols, with 'Gemini Energy Drink' written below. The sides of the can display blocks of white text, likely nutritional information and ingredients, as well as a barcode. The can has a typical pull tab opening on top, made of silver metal. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible condensation. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, with a focus on astrological motifs.
description: A purple-to-blue gradient aluminum can with zodiac-themed graphics, white text, and a silver pull tab. The design is sleek, modern, and visually striking.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the can with dense white text and a partial barcode, emphasizing the informational content.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the left side of the main label, with the large 'II ZODIAC' text and surrounding zodiac symbols becoming visible.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the central 'II ZODIAC' graphic, zodiac symbols, and 'Gemini Energy Drink' text at the bottom.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the nutritional information table and barcode, with less emphasis on the main graphic elements.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold purple-to-blue gradient background with a large Roman numeral II, surrounded by zodiac symbols in black. White sans-serif text is used for product information, and the overall style is modern and astrological.
